command:
python -c 
import urllib.request, http.cookiejar

out = 'tasks/t0002_literature_survey_dsgc_compartmental_models/assets/paper/10.1016_j.neuron.2016.02.013/files/poleg-polsky_2016_nmda-dsgc-multiplicative.pdf'

# Try Elsevier 'free resource' URL from eLink  
# The eLink says free resource at Elsevier linkinghub
jar = http.cookiejar.CookieJar()
opener = urllib.request.build_opener(urllib.request.HTTPCookieProcessor(jar))
opener.addheaders = [
    ('User-Agent', 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36'),
    ('Accept', 'text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,application/pdf,*/*'),
]

# Follow the linkinghub chain
url = 'https://linkinghub.elsevier.com/retrieve/pii/S0896-6273(16)00106-9'
try:
    resp = opener.open(url, timeout=30)
    data = resp.read()
    final_url = resp.url
    ct = resp.headers.get('Content-Type', '')
    print(f'Final URL: {final_url}')
    print(f'Content-Type: {ct}')
    print(f'Size: {len(data)}')
    if data[:4] == b'%PDF':
        with open(out, 'wb') as f:
            f.write(data)
        print('SUCCESS')
    else:
        print('Not PDF, content:', data[:500])
except Exception as e:
    print(f'Error: {e}')
